title: game_capture_region – input
description: Captures a cropped PNG screenshot of a rectangular region of the game window.

x.description: Left edge of the capture region in screen pixels.

y.description: Top edge of the capture region in screen pixels.

width.description: Width of the capture region in screen pixels.

height.description: Height of the capture region in screen pixels.

sessionId.description: Optional caller-supplied identifier echoed back in the response.

includeCursor.description: Reserved for future use. Has no effect currently.
